channel.title: Researchs on Prismahardi Aji Riyantoko
channel.description: Recent content in Researchs on Prismahardi Aji Riyantoko

item.title: A.E.G.I.S.: Autonomous Ecosystem Guardian and Integrated Systems
item.description: A seven-year research program building a fully autonomous, post-quantum secured, tri-domain robotic ecosystem capable of self-sustaining energy management, formal safety verification, and confidential edge computation.
